title: plantago maritima subsp. salsa
intro: Plantago maritima subsp. salsa, also known as Sea Plantain, is a subspecies of the Plantago maritima plant, which is a perennial herb native to coastal areas of Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sea Plantain include reducing swelling and pain, treating wounds, and helping to lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
